meta.title: Siberian Cedar — premium pine nut kernels from the taiga
meta.description: Siberian Cedar — ecologically clean pine nut kernels from the heart of the Siberian taiga. Hand harvested, eco-processed, shipped direct.

hero.title: Premium Pine Nut Kernels — Direct from the Heart of the Taiga
hero.subtitle: Experience the pure, organic taste of pine nut kernels carefully harvested in the pristine forests of Siberia.

journey.title: Our Journey from the Taiga to You
journey.subtitle: Three honest steps — no shortcuts, no extras.
journey.productionText: The Siberian Cedar Eco-Factory is a leading processor of pine nut kernels and other natural products, with 24 years in the industry. Member of the INC (International Nut and Dried Fruit Council) since 2022.

steps.title: Wild Harvest
steps.text: Hand-picked in the untouched Siberian taiga, with deep respect for the forest.

steps.title: Eco Processing
steps.text: Our in-house Siberian Eco Factory uses gentle low-temperature drying (never above 39 °C), with zero preservatives.

steps.title: Delivery across Europe
steps.text: We ship directly from the producer to customers anywhere in Europe — no middlemen, freshness guaranteed.

packaging.title: Our Products
packaging.subtitle: Choose a format — from a sample pouch to a wholesale pallet.
packaging.highlights: 670 kcal / 100 g · 12-month shelf life · 100 % pine nut kernel · vacuum-sealed

modal.overviewText: Fresh shelled pine nut kernel from the Siberian Cedar Eco-Factory. Harvested in ecologically clean Siberian forests, far from industrial areas. Passes a 12-stage cleaning and inspection process, including radiation control in a modern laboratory.
modal.benefitsText: Contains a full set of amino acids and micro-elements (copper, cobalt, manganese, zinc). Rich in arginine — important for growing bodies. Recommended for pregnant women and children.
modal.shelfLifeText: 12 months sealed. Up to 6 months after opening when stored at +2…+6 °C.
modal.storageText: At +20 °C, relative humidity no more than 70%.
modal.packagingText: Vacuum-sealed — oxidation is halted until the moment you open it.

about.title: 12 cleaning stages and 6 levels of control
about.lead: Expert know-how lets us reach the highest kernel quality at every step — from manual sorting to radiation analysis in a modern laboratory.

pillars.title: Harvest-site & quality control
pillars.text: We source from vetted suppliers in Western and Eastern Siberia. Incoming raw material passes organoleptic inspection, removal of mechanical impurities and damaged nuts, plus radiological and biological control.

pillars.title: Gentle processing
pillars.text: To preserve the maximum of nutrients and guarantee long freshness, we use modern cleaning and thermal-treatment technology — and never wash already-cleaned kernels.

pillars.title: Modern equipment
pillars.text: The factory is equipped to grade kernels by calibre and eliminate even the smallest foreign particles, producing uniformly high-quality batches.

pillars.title: Careful storage
pillars.text: Warehouses are kept at controlled temperature, humidity, ventilation and lighting, with full sanitary compliance. Kernels are then vacuum-packed — oxidation is halted until opening, locking in freshness and microbiological stability across the whole shelf life.

about.aside: Our range also includes selected dried fruits from Uzbekistan — available on request.

certificates.title: Certified quality you can trust
certificates.subtitle: Official European certifications — plus HACCP, ISO 22000 and an EU export licence.

items.title: Organic Certificate (EU Euroleaf)
items.text: The Siberian Eco-Factory production holds the European Bio-Certificate «Organic» for six product categories, including shelled pine nut kernels. The certificate guarantees that the produce — gathered in the Siberian taiga — contains at least 95% ingredients grown in line with biodynamic-farming standards. Marked with the green-leaf EU Organic logo.

certificates.footnote: The production also complies with HACCP food-safety standards, is certified under ISO 22000-2007, and holds an EU export licence №060RU20002005086.
